tasks.subject: Task 1: Add neovim, fd, lazygit to devbox.json
Task 2: Create nvim directory scaffold (init.lua, options, keymaps)
Task 3: Add UI plugins (tokyonight, lualine, neo-tree)
Task 4: Add editor plugins (autopairs, Comment, gitsigns, conform)
Task 7: Add LSP stack (Mason + lspconfig + nvim-cmp)
Task 8: Update bootstrap.sh (nvim symlink + opencode install)
